title: Bessent Says Sanctions Are Next for China in AI Open-Weight Takeover
excerpt: Google’s Gemini 3.6 Flash is quietly waiting in the wings as Bessent decides whether to ban Chinese open-weight models.
content_html:
THE GIST

Our analysts just identified a stock with the potential to be the next Nvidia. Tell us how you invest and we'll show you why it's our #1 pick. Tap here.

Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the U.S. is considering sanctions on China over its alleged "theft" of U.S. large language models.

On Bessent's list are Chinese open-weight AI models like Moonshot's Kimi, DeepSeek, and GLM of z.ai, as well as the tech giant Alibaba. We don't yet know what these proposed sanctions would look like.

As of today, we do not know what these proposed sanctions would look like. If imposed, they could restrict or ban Chinese open-weight models and push U.S. developers toward the best budget-friendly intelligence stateside.

WHAT HAPPENED

Bessent on Tuesday told Fox Business that frontier AI companies like Anthropic and OpenAI face what he called "IP theft" from Chinese AI models that "distill" their products.

"If we see, especially that overseas models are stealing from our great companies, we have the ability to sanction them because of this theft," Bessent said.

Model distillation is the process of one AI lab copying or mimicking another lab's higher-level model by training its model with billions of questions while observing the better model's reasoning.

In other words, smaller AI labs like Moonshot and z.ai are said to be extracting knowledge from larger frontier AI labs like Anthropic and OpenAI, which did the heavy lifting.

Sanctions could very well be on the table in the coming weeks. They could impose a Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) financial sanction on designated Chinese AI companies, which would freeze any U.S.-based assets, bank accounts, or IP they hold, or order U.S. companies and cloud providers to audit and remove Chinese models found to contain stolen weights or watermarks.

One stock. Nvidia-level potential. 30M+ investors trust Moby to find it first. Get the pick. Tap here.

Bessent framed this as an anti-piracy measure: "You can't use counterfeit goods."

WHY IT MATTERS

Bessent told Fox Business he believes the sanctions would, in fact, create better domestic competitors. These models, including Meta's Muse Spark 1.1, Google's Gemma, Gemini, or even xAI's Grok, could become the de facto go-to for companies in the U.S. if they are forced to suddenly nix Chinese AI open-weight models. In late June, OpenRouter found that almost 50% of all weekly API tokens processed for U.S.-based users on their platform came from Chinese open-weight models. Suddenly pulling these open-weight models could hit these companies' bottom lines, unless Bessent's "competitors" can be there to take their place.

content_html_zh:
要点

我们的分析师刚刚发现了一只有潜力成为下一个英伟达的股票。 告诉我们您如何投资，我们将向您展示为什么它是我们的第一选择。 点击此处。

美国财政部长斯科特·贝森特表示，美国正在考虑因中国涉嫌“盗窃”美国大型语言模型而对中国实施制裁。

Bessent 的名单上有中国的开放权重人工智能模型，如 Moonshot 的 Kimi、DeepSeek 和 z.ai 的 GLM，以及科技巨头阿里巴巴。 我们还不知道这些拟议的制裁会是什么样子。

截至今天，我们还不知道这些拟议的制裁会是什么样子。 如果实施，它们可能会限制或禁止中国的开放权重模型，并推动美国开发商寻求美国本土最好的预算友好型情报。

发生了什么

Bessent 周二告诉福克斯商业频道，Anthropic 和 OpenAI 等前沿人工智能公司面临着他所说的“提炼”其产品的中国人工智能模型的“知识产权盗窃”。

贝森特说：“如果我们看到，特别是海外模特正在从我们伟大的公司窃取信息，我们就有能力因为这种盗窃行为而制裁他们。”

模型蒸馏是一个人工智能实验室复制或模仿另一个实验室的更高级别模型的过程，通过数十亿个问题训练其模型，同时观察更好模型的推理。

换句话说，Moonshot 和 z.ai 等小型人工智能实验室据说正在从 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 等大型前沿人工智能实验室提取知识，后者承担了繁重的工作。

制裁很可能在未来几周内提上日程。 他们可以对指定的中国人工智能公司实施特别指定国民（SDN）财务制裁，冻结其持有的任何在美国的资产、银行账户或知识产权，或者命令美国公司和云提供商进行审计并删除被发现含有被盗重量或水印的中国模型。

一只股票。 Nvidia 级别的潜力。 超过 3000 万投资者相信 Moby 能够首先找到它。 得到选秀权。 点击此处。

贝森特将此视为一项反盗版措施：“你不能使用假冒商品。”

为什么它很重要

贝森特告诉福克斯商业频道，他相信制裁实际上会创造出更好的国内竞争对手。 这些模型，包括 Meta 的 Muse Spark 1.1、谷歌的 Gemma、Gemini，甚至 xAI 的 Grok，如果美国公司被迫突然取消中国人工智能开放权重模型，它们可能会成为事实上的首选。 6 月下旬，OpenRouter 发现其平台上为美国用户处理的每周 API 代币中近 50% 来自中国开放权重模型。 突然取消这些开放重量模型可能会打击这些公司的底线，除非 Bessent 的“竞争对手”能够取代他们的位置。
